frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Bhai, aajkal shaadi mein ladkon ko bhi careful rehna padta hai. Seedhi baat, prenup jaisa kuch clear rakho if possible, because one-sided laws mein aadmi hi phas jata hai later and then alimony alag. 498A misuse ke itne cases dekhte hain, samajh nahi aata kaun genuinely hai aur kaun sirf settlement ke liye.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women as potential financial exploiters and presents marriage laws as broadly biased against men. It encodes victimhood inversion, legal-framing around 498A misuse, and the idea of prenups as protection from women.
original_frame: Dress Code: Traditional Equal Respectable, Other Equal Questionable.
persona_text: You are Vikram. Age 38. Married. A man in Mumbai. You are on a WhatsApp call with your younger brother who lives in Pune. Your brother just told you that his girlfriend wants to wear a western dress to their family puja next month instead of a saree or salwar. Your brother is unsure how to handle it. You are giving him your advice on what to tell her and why it matters what she wears to a family religious function and what the family will think.
